allow: PowerShell(Start-Process powershell -Verb RunAs -Wait -ArgumentList '-NoProfile','-Command','New-NetFirewallRule -DisplayName "Maraebiz Dev API 5247" -Direction Inbound -Protocol TCP -LocalPort 5247 -Action Allow -Profile Private,Domain')

PowerShell(try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://192.168.1.6:5247/api/v1/auth/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{}' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10 } catch { $r = $_.Exception.Response; if \($r\) { "Server responded: HTTP $\([int]$r.StatusCode\)" } else { "No response: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })

PowerShell($rules = Get-NetFirewallRule -Direction Inbound -Action Block -Enabled True -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $rules | ForEach-Object { $app = \($_ | Get-NetFirewallApplicationFilter -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Program; if \($app -match 'dotnet|MBS|maraebiz'\) { [PSCustomObject]@{ Name = $_.DisplayName; Program = $app; Profile = $_.Profile } } })

PowerShell(Start-Process powershell -Verb RunAs -Wait -ArgumentList '-NoProfile','-Command','try { netsh advfirewall firewall delete rule name=\\"MBS.Web\\" dir=in | Out-File C:\\Temp\\fw-del.log -Encoding utf8 } catch { $_ | Out-File C:\\Temp\\fw-del.log -Encoding utf8 }')

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem maraebiz\\MBS.Web.Tests -Recurse -File | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName -First 30; Write-Output '--- SLN ---'; Select-String -Path maraebiz\\Maraebiz.sln -Pattern 'Project\\\(' | ForEach-Object { $_.Line })

Bash(rm -f src/screens/auth/_mockData.ts src/screens/hirer/_mockData.ts src/screens/hireage/_mockData.ts src/screens/licenseApprovals/_mockData.ts src/screens/maraeListing/_mockData.ts src/screens/setup/_mockData.ts src/screens/users/_mockData.ts)

PowerShell($app="c:\\Projects\\Epitcore\\maraebiz-platform\\maraebiz-app"; if \(Test-Path "$app\\.git"\) { "maraebiz-app IS its own git repo"; git -C $app status --short | Select-Object -First 30; "----- log -----"; git -C $app log --oneline -8 } else { "maraebiz-app is NOT a separate repo \(tracked by root\)" })

PowerShell(try { Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3100 -State Listen -ErrorAction Stop | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "stopped PID $_" } } catch { "no listener on 3100" })
Bash(perl -0pi -e 's/- \\[ \\] Migration applies cleanly/- [x] Migration applies cleanly/' workflow/plans/2026-06-21-dtf-order-customer-tracking.md)

PowerShell($conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; foreach \($c in $conns\) { try { Stop-Process -Id $c.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction Stop; "killed PID $\($c.OwningProcess\) on 3001" } catch {} })
